title: LogRocket API credentials should not be disclosed
description: LogRocket is a frontend monitoring and session replay platform. LogRocket credentials include App IDs and API keys. Session replays may contain sensitive user interactions. API keys provide access to session data, error reports, and user analytics.
recommendation: Remove LogRocket credentials from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at app.logrocket.com.
impact: Unauthorized access to session recordings potentially containing PII, form inputs, error logs, and user behavioral data.

checks.message: LogRocket API key detected. LogRocket records user sessions that may contain sensitive form inputs, network requests with API tokens, Redux/Vuex state snapshots, and error stack traces. API access exposes this data. Rotate immediately at app.logrocket.com.
